_comment: Recruitable musicians. 'requires' lists item TAGS they expect for practices/gigs to go well (e.g. drummer wants food). 'vices' flavor + later mechanics. Consumed in the recruit/practice steps. reliability/skill are 0..1.

npcs.name: Sal
npcs.line: Sal owns The Dive. "Bring me a record and a crowd and we'll talk."

npcs.name: Deb
npcs.line: "I've been at every show since the place opened."

npcs.name: Walt
npcs.line: Walt nods. "Mornings are the only quiet time around here."

npcs.name: Hank
npcs.line: Hank wipes a glass. "Foundry's loud tonight. Good."

npcs.name: Lou
npcs.line: "I know every band in this city. Most of 'em owe me money."

npcs.name: Rae
npcs.line: Rae cradles a guitar she can't afford yet.

npcs.name: Gabe
npcs.line: "You playing soon? I'll be there."

npcs.name: Min
npcs.line: Min shoves a flyer at you.

npcs.name: Gus
npcs.line: "Foundry or bust around here, kid."

npcs.name: Nina
npcs.line: Nina is locked into a cabinet.

npcs.name: Ozzy
npcs.line: "I've seen every band that rolled through here."

npcs.name: Marcus
npcs.line: Marcus runs The Bijou. "Bring me a record and a room full of people, and you headline."

npcs.name: Pearl
npcs.line: Pearl books the Hey-Hey. "This room's heard the greats. Earn your slot."

npcs.name: Antoine
npcs.line: Antoine holds court at The Brass House. "You got the pocket? Then we'll talk."

npcs.name: DJ Mirage
npcs.line: DJ Mirage nods. "Catch our set at the Voltage Room. You'll learn something."

npcs.name: Hank Tatum
npcs.line: "The Stomp's our room, kid. Earn it."

npcs.name: Zydeco Pete
npcs.line: "Y'all groove? The Second Line don't board passengers, only players."

npcs.name: MC Eastside
npcs.line: "Drydock's where reputations get made. Don't waste my time."

npcs.name: Roz
npcs.line: Roz runs The Soul Cellar. "Bring me a record and a room that moves, and you headline."

npcs.name: Sidewalk bassist
npcs.line: A bassist thumbs a slow groove on the corner. "This whole city runs on the one, baby."

npcs.name: Block regular
npcs.line: "Groove Row never sleeps. Cellar's where you wanna end up - but you gotta earn The Pocket first."

npcs.name: Sully
npcs.line: Sully books The Brick House. "Bring a record and a packed room, kid, and it's yours."

npcs.name: Subway guitarist
npcs.line: A kid shreds a beat-up Strat by the T stop. "Whole city's a basement show, man."

npcs.name: Townie regular
npcs.line: "Brick House if you've got a record. The Wharf's where the pit lives - bring the heavy stuff."

npcs.name: Keish
npcs.line: Keish runs Peachtree Hall. "You got a record and a crowd that moves? We talk numbers."

npcs.name: Corner rapper
npcs.line: A kid spits a sixteen over a phone beat. "Down here the bass IS the weather."

npcs.name: Block regular
npcs.line: "Honeycomb to cut your teeth, Peachtree Hall when you blow up. The Bando? That's where the real ones go."

npcs.name: Brandi
npcs.line: Brandi books The Echo. "Everyone in this town has a demo. Bring a crowd or bring buzz - ideally both."

npcs.name: Boulevard busker
npcs.line: A guy in fringe noodles a solo nobody asked for. "Discovered? Baby, I'm a vibe."

npcs.name: Scene veteran
npcs.line: "Troubadont for the open mic, The Echo to get seen. The Strip eats posers - bring the riffs."

npcs.name: Wren
npcs.line: Wren books The Aladdinn. "We like a record and a quiet kind of crowd. No rock-star nonsense."

npcs.name: Fingerpicker
npcs.line: A picker hums an old tune under an awning, out of the rain. "Everybody here's in three bands."

npcs.name: Flannel regular
npcs.line: "Knotty Pine's always open. Aladdinn when you've got a record. The Foghorn's for the folk crowd down by the water."

npcs.name: Marisol
npcs.line: Marisol books Golden Gate Hall. "Bring a record, a following, and good vibes. We're picky."

npcs.name: Hill-street busker
npcs.line: Someone loops a synth into a busted amp on the corner. "The fog does the reverb for free."

npcs.name: Foghead regular
npcs.line: "Fillmost to start, Golden Gate Hall to arrive. The Foglab down on the Bay is electronic-only - bring the machines."

npcs.name: Nigel
npcs.line: Nigel books Brixton Hall. "Bring a record and a proper crowd, mate, and the night's yours."

npcs.name: Tube busker
npcs.line: A busker bashes out a singalong on the platform. "Three chords and the truth, innit."

npcs.name: Estate regular
npcs.line: "Crown & Anchor to start, Brixton Hall to get seen. Camden Crawl's where the guitars live - bring the riffs."

npcs.name: Heike
npcs.line: Heike books Funkhall. "A record, a crowd, and no drama. We start late and end later."

npcs.name: U-Bahn busker
npcs.line: Someone runs a drum machine into a busking amp. "In this city, you sleep when the sun's up."

npcs.name: Kreuzberg regular
npcs.line: "Klub 36 for the loud stuff. The Vault out on Bunker Block is techno only - bring the machines and your stamina."

npcs.name: Joost
npcs.line: Joost books The Melkhuis. "Bring a record and a warm room. We like it loose and a little smoky."

npcs.name: Bridge busker
npcs.line: A guitarist noodles on a bridge over the canal. "Everything echoes off the water here, man."

npcs.name: Cafe regular
npcs.line: "Cafe Bruin's always warm. The Houseboat on Canal Sessions is jazz - bring the brushes, not the distortion."

npcs.name: Aiko
npcs.line: Aiko books Liquid Hall. "A record, a crowd, and punctuality. We run a tight night here."

npcs.name: Underpass busker
npcs.line: A kid loops a synth under the overpass. "In Tokyolo even the silence has a BPM."

npcs.name: Shibuya regular
npcs.line: "Club Neon to start, Liquid Hall to rise. The Noise Floor on Static Alley is electronic - bring the gear."

npcs.name: Goro
npcs.line: Goro books Namba Dome. "Bring a record and a rowdy crowd. Osanka likes it loud and a little stupid."

npcs.name: Bridge busker
npcs.line: Someone shreds over the canal under the Glico sign. "Tokyolo's polite. Osanka's fun."

npcs.name: Namba regular
npcs.line: "Namba Rocks for the loud stuff. The Pit on Dotonbori Din is metal only - bring the heavy."

npcs.name: Emi
npcs.line: Emi books Gion Hall. "Bring a record and a respectful room. We keep it quiet and very good."

npcs.name: Riverbank busker
npcs.line: A picker plays something old by the river. "The water keeps the time here."

npcs.name: Old Town regular
npcs.line: "Kissa Blue for the jazz, Gion Hall when you've arrived. The Teahouse by the river is traditional strings - play gentle."
